---
title: 'Journal 06/27/2019'
date: '2019-06-27T18:17:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8968617810606296832'
blogger_filename: '/2019/06/journal-06272019.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

Dear Jesus,<br />
<br />
I'm feeling........ emotionally sore today. Setting that Boundary was HARD. It felt good, but it felt hard. I still feel so desperate to have "my Shelley" back. But I see many ways in which we were unhealthy for each other in our current state. I was so desperate for just one more affirmation that I spent hours and hours not focusing on school, blogs, or my own boys... making them fend for themselves. I can't say that emotionally it was any different than running out to Spokane and leaving them alone for the night.<br />
<br />
Someday, as I build myself up in you on a solid foundation, I can have a healthy relationship. Someday, that relationship will be amazing. There are things I love about Shelley. I'm in love with Shelley. I can see things about her that astound me and I KNOW she will do great things. I am honored to know her and I hope to see her on a platform doing her Joyce Meyers thing. I hope you bring her a Dave but I'm also starting to see it's probably not me.<br />
<br />
In very practical terms, I can see how we're not a perfect fit. She knows her value or is beginning to see it. She's practicing making it known by "Go ahead, look around, you won't find better!" And I appreciate that because I need to start having that same confidence. You made me to be who I am and I don't have to apologize for it any longer.<br />
<br />
But I also know that I need someone who will sit with me in the emotion and work through it. Someone who will pursue me in my intensity and not run from it. I need someone who is less focused on personal appearance. I DEFINITELY DO NOT want to be the "Hot Couple" she wants. I want to be the couple that walks in without fanfare but makes a huge impact behind the scenes. While crowds follow the other, individuals come sit with us and get their life changed.<br />
<br />
I want someone attractive but not "dolled up". Someone who owns makeup but rarely uses it. Someone whose favorite outfit is a sundress or jeans and a t-shirt... maybe yoga pants, grrr...<br />
<br />
Maybe that'll all change as I grow in my own confidence though? Maybe as I get fit, and start respecting myself, those things will grow.<br />
<br />
One thing I don't think I'll grow out of is that I want someone who's "comfortable". Easy to be with. Someone who I don't struggle to communicate with or feel heard from. Theresa is a good example of that. We'd probably have moments of frustration but we'd work through them together. That's someone to look for.<br />
<br />
Even typing all of this out, I'm feeling my own sense of identity growing back, not lost so much in the need for Shelley to approve me and see me. I'm even beginning to see the whole her. Not just the awesome and not just the awful but all off it.<br />
<br />
YOU, Jesus, complete me. Not some woman. I need you and you alone. And from the overflow of our relationship, I can love others and even someday love "her", wherever she is.<br />
<br />
Thanks for listening... is there anything you want to say right now before I go?<br />
<br />
<br />
*****************<br />
<br />
Yes. Lots of stuff. But you don't have time for all of it today. I'm proud of you, Son. You are my handiwork. The apple of my eye. I see you and swell with pride over how you've grown these last few weeks. I know it was hard. I know it wasn't easy or fun. At times it was excruciating. But you are the one who holds the power to let me make you into the man I always intended you to be.<br />
<br />
Don't worry about the past or mistakes. "What could have or should have been". Just be present in each moment. Let that story unfold. That story is what it is. No one else is you or your story. Live your story out and let it influence others to live theirs.<br />
<br />
It's time to rise up from the ashes of defeat and take your rightful place as King and Heir. Authority and Anointing have been given to you for such a time as this. If you will hear my voice, connect with my heart, and follow my lead... you will be shocked at who you've become a year of moments from now.<br />
<br />
Go be Amazing!<br />
<br />
<br />
***************<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190627-103718-3ab9db214ab6.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190627-103718-7ec1ad3e6656.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190627-103713-2c24b9dae1bd.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190627-103713-d6cdf74f0654.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190627-103709-fa345c5af62b.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190627-103709-0ab9d7aac0d5.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190627-103704-25bae6a49dbd.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190627-103704-a9b3c25d6b3a.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190627-103658-b082030d4df6.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190627-103658-b4d3791707aa.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190627-103650-2525918a6a57.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190627-103650-46b8476607c9.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fb-img-1561654248026-ed07ec5cb4f7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="650" data-original-width="720" height="288" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fb-img-1561654248026-55fb54e20fd6.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fb-img-1561653997767-3f83bd7d574d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="500" data-original-width="500" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fb-img-1561653997767-44dbfe6fb38d.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215519-8ccc39e33ac4.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215519-9e38b0395b20.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215512-c88fb2ebfd73.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215512-d85dc42a7c69.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215506-e47a0ae0cdc1.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215506-7015fd5ef45d.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215500-0f00f436d902.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215500-42d4ce4025fb.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215455-6fee07a845f5.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215455-4d46b2787ba3.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215450-e32e234f4874.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215450-f9fa143af1be.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215440-3bdb1ca7b67c.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215440-6372aaecdcc0.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215434-a1c4d4db8bf2.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-215434-92aabcc06316.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-212526-b67f946fc41f.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-212526-31edd6d085de.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-212519-d0a770c94747.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-212519-4095f6b0c3c4.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-201219-f332a467fbd6.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190626-201219-273e903185c4.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fb-img-1561599515092-6d1fdf3daca0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="778" data-original-width="778" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fb-img-1561599515092-822eee2bd723.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fb-img-1561584317733-65e7e997dc98.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="928" data-original-width="1080" height="274" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fb-img-1561584317733-64d0a4b90e2d.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
